name: form
description: The server-first Form: a native <form> wrapper that owns a form-level validation message region (role=alert) and stacks its field children, the server-rendered analogue of shadcn's Form (FormProvider) + a top-level FormMessage for the error not tied to a single field. Pairs with the field partial, which does the per-field aria wiring. JS-off it POSTs natively; with the wire runtime the same markup submits over the wire.
docs: Copies the form partial to your JTE root at lievit/form.jte, reached as @template.lievit.form(id=..., action=..., error=..., content=@`...`). Render your fields as @template.lievit.field calls inside the content slot; pass the form-level (non-field) validation message as `error` and it renders a role=alert region the form references via aria-describedby. The source is yours: edit freely.
